text: I feel a sense of anticipation in these spaces. The strict geometry and clear glass of the first room suggest preparation for an idea yet to arrive—a blank space brimming with possibility. The second room, vibrant with color and words about research and development, stirs in me a curiosity about creation. Both rooms evoke a world in motion, pushing thought forward. I am drawn to the future that these spaces promise—a future crafted by human intention and collaborative intelligence.
